rows.label: qev030601_MSG0040
rows.name:
Oh! You're the lifesaver
who rescued us from the hands of the Growth! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0041
rows.name:
I saw it, zo!
Your fighting, like that of a Valdileo!
I respect you deeply, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0042
rows.name:
...That's right! I'll have you decide for me!
I thought about having Liana decide at first, but
she's so noisy about every little thing! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0043
rows.name:
Now, decide my marriage partner right now!
Heptana or Enneana...
Which one should I marry, da!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_SEL0011
rows.name:
Confirm if it is really okay
for you to decide.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_SEL0021
rows.name:
Refuse, stating you cannot decide
someone else's marriage partner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0044
rows.name:
With the judgment of a brave warrior like you,
there's surely no mistake, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0045
rows.name: You're quite the serious one, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0046
rows.name:
But, seeing how you fight,
I was convinced I could trust you, da.
No matter what you choose, I won't hold a grudge, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0047
rows.name:
Besides, my respected Grandpa Aldo
is nearing his time to go...
I want to show him me in my best moment while he's still alive, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0048
rows.name:
...Na?
I have to decide quickly, da.
So, I'm counting on you, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0049
rows.name:
Oh! You'll accept!?
Then I'll tell you about the two I love,
so choose one of them! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0050
rows.name:
First is Heptana Logur!
She's an amazing hunter who can outdo men, and she's strong, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0051
rows.name:
Her personality is frank and bright,
so she'd make a good mother, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0052
rows.name:
The other is Enneana Spicar!
She's a domestic girl who is good at knitting, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0053
rows.name:
She's a quiet girl, which is rare for a Bias,
and she's very cute, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0054
rows.name:
Both are wonderful girls, da.
Now... decide!
I'll marry the one you choose for me, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_JNK0030
rows.name: Heptana Logur[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell him he should marry Heptana Logur.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_JNK0040
rows.name: Enneana Spicar[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell him he should marry Enneana Spicar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0055
rows.name:
Oh! Heptana, is it!
Ha ha, do you like strong-willed ones too? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0056
rows.name:
With her around, whether it's Growth or whoever,
I can rest easy knowing she'd turn the tables on anyone who attacks us! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0057
rows.name:
...No, of course I'll fight too, zo?
Don't misunderstand that part! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0058
rows.name:
Alright...
Anyway, I will marry Heptana!
Since it's decided, go talk things over with her. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0059
rows.name:
She should be hunting in the West Gate Plain
of the Primordial Wilderness, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0060
rows.name:
To make the proof of our marriage...
a horn ring,
I'm going to go hunt some beasts, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0061
rows.name:
Oh! Enneana, is it!
Kind women are the best after all, na!
You really understand, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0062
rows.name:
Heh heh...
With Enneana, I feel like she'll kindly let me
depend on her as much as I want, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0063
rows.name:
...No, of course I won't just depend on her, zo!
I'll pull her along like a true man, da!
R-Really, zo? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0064
rows.name:
Alright...
Anyway, I will marry Enneana!
Since it's decided, go talk things over with her. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0065
rows.name:
She should be knitting
on the starboard side, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0066
rows.name:
To make the proof of our marriage...
a horn ring,
I'm going to go hunt some beasts, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0070
rows.name:
Oh! [ST:playername ]!
Thank you for saving Heptana...
my wife, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0071
rows.name:
The wedding is about to begin, da.
If you don't mind, could you help with the preparations? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0072
rows.name:
We're in an unfamiliar land, so there are many things we lack,
and Big sis Duna is troubled, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0073
rows.name:
Ha ha...
Everyone is drinking a little too much, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0074
rows.name:
Don't just sip your drink, Nemard,
drink it down all at once like a man, na.
Aren't you ashamed making me drink it all? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0075
rows.name:
But, if I get drunk,
when Heptana passes out from drinking,
I won't be able to carry her home on my back, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0076
rows.name:
That's why just a little is enough for me, da.
Besides, just having Heptana by my side is enough
to make me happy... so I don't need anything like that, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0077
rows.name:
Wha...! You idiot, na!
Stop saying such embarrassing things, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0078
rows.name:
Ggh... ugh...
You really are a hopeless guy, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0079
rows.name:
Ha ha...
Even though it's a joyous occasion,
everyone is drinking a little too much, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0080
rows.name:
Don't just sip your drink, Nemard,
drink it down all at once like a man, na.
Aren't you ashamed making me drink it all? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0081
rows.name:
But, if I get drunk,
when Heptana passes out from drinking,
I won't be able to carry her home on my back, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0082
rows.name:
That's why just a little is enough for me, da.
Besides, just having Heptana by my side is enough
to make me happy... so I don't need anything like that, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0083
rows.name:
Wha...! You idiot, na!
Stop saying such embarrassing things, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0084
rows.name:
Ggh... ugh...
You really are a hopeless guy, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Oh! You're back.
I was waiting for you, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Thanks to you, I was able to
safely marry Heptana like this, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Naturally, I want to start the oath ceremony
with words of congratulation from you. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0004
rows.name:
That's right. If you hadn't saved me,
I might have died without ever experiencing
such a happy moment, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm asking you too.
It's a bit embarrassing, but...
I want you to show us the path forward, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0006
rows.name:
...You don't need to think too hard about it, da.
Just treat it like you're giving a stern lecture
to a slightly sloppy guy like me, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_JNK0050
rows.name: Lecture[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_SEL0051
rows.name:
Offer congratulations while telling him to become
a strong man who can protect his family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_JNK0060
rows.name: Congratulate[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_SEL0061
rows.name:
Offer congratulations, saying Nemard
is fine just the way he is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Uncle Galba said
the exact same thing to me, zo.
You really are a warrior to the core! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Understood! I will become much, much stronger,
and become a man who can protect Heptana
from the Growth and those Cavern bastards, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0009
rows.name:
...My sister said the exact same thing to me, zo.
She said to treat Heptana kindly,
just like always, no matter what happens. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Understood! I will become a strong Bias
who can be considerate of Heptana's feelings
even in the most painful times, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0011
rows.name:
Now, Heptana!
Please accept this horn ring! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0012
rows.name:
I... did my best, beat down a Rumedel,
and got this horn, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0013
rows.name:
It represents my utmost feelings!
I love you so, so much, zo! Heptana! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Nemard... I...
Hic, I'm so happy, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0015
rows.name:
Thank you for taking an unwomanly woman
like me... as your bride, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Crying like that, Heptana,
you are an incredibly cute woman, zo.
I should be the one saying... thank you for marrying me. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0017
rows.name:
With this, the marriage is happily established, da.
A Bias man will absolutely never separate from the woman
he offered the horn ring to until death, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0018
rows.name:
Ha ha! Grandpa Aldo is also
scrunching up his face in joy for us... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0019
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]!
Thank you so much, na.
I will absolutely make her happy, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0088
rows.name:
Oh! [ST:playername ]!
I heard you helped Enneana out, na.
I got a really cool stomach band from her, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0089
rows.name:
The wedding is about to begin, da.
If you don't mind, could you help with the preparations? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0090
rows.name:
We're in an unfamiliar land, so there are many things we lack,
and Big sis Duna is troubled, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0091
rows.name:
Ha ha...
As expected, all Bias men are heavy drinkers, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0092
rows.name:
Ah... Enneana, are you not drinking?
Today is our first free-for-all party in a while, da.
You don't need to hold back just because you're the bride, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0093
rows.name:
...I shouldn't... If Enneana drinks alcohol,
I'll definitely end up crying, so... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0094
rows.name:
Why would you cry, da?
I don't really get it, but
no matter how much you cry, I'll wipe your tears away, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0095
rows.name:
Ha ha... From now on, forever, na!
So don't worry about it,
just cry whenever you want, as much as you want, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0096
rows.name:
...That's mean...
Even though I'm trying so hard to hold back my tears... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0097
rows.name:
Enneana is... just so happy...
I can't... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0098
rows.name:
Ha ha...
As expected, all Bias men are heavy drinkers, na.
The booze is disappearing one after another, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0099
rows.name:
Ah... Enneana, are you not drinking?
Today is our first free-for-all party in a while, da.
You don't need to hold back just because you're the bride, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0100
rows.name:
...I shouldn't... If Enneana drinks alcohol,
I'll definitely end up crying, so... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0101
rows.name:
Why would you cry, da?
I don't really get it, but
no matter how much you cry, I'll wipe your tears away, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0102
rows.name:
Ha ha... From now on, forever, na!
So don't worry about it,
just cry whenever you want, as much as you want, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0103
rows.name:
...That's mean...
Even though I'm trying so hard to hold back my tears... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0104
rows.name:
Enneana is... just so happy...
I can't... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Oh! You're back.
I was waiting for you, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Thanks to you, I was able to
safely marry Enneana like this, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0022
rows.name:
Naturally, I want to start the oath ceremony
with words of congratulation from you. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0023
rows.name:
Yes...
If you hadn't come to Enneana,
this happiness would never have visited us... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0024
rows.name:
That's the feeling I have for some reason, na...
Please.
Please show Enneana and the others the path forward. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0025
rows.name:
...You don't need to think too hard about it, da.
Just treat it like you're giving a stern lecture
to a slightly sloppy guy like me, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_JNK0070
rows.name: Lecture[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_SEL0071
rows.name:
Offer congratulations while telling him to become
a strong man who can protect his family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_JNK0080
rows.name: Congratulate[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_SEL0081
rows.name:
Offer congratulations, saying Nemard
is fine just the way he is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Uncle Galba said
the exact same thing to me, zo.
You really are a warrior to the core! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0027
rows.name:
Understood! I will become much, much stronger,
and become a man who can protect Enneana
from the Growth and those Cavern bastards, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0028
rows.name:
...My sister said the exact same thing to me, zo.
She said to treat Enneana kindly,
just like always, no matter what happens. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0029
rows.name:
Understood! I will become a strong Bias
who can be considerate of Enneana's feelings
even in the most painful times, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0030
rows.name:
Now, Enneana!
Please accept this horn ring! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0031
rows.name:
I... did my best, beat down a Rumedel,
and got this horn, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0032
rows.name:
This is in return for the stomach band
I got from Enneana, zo!
I love you so, so much, zo! Enneana! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0033
rows.name:
Uugh... Waaaaaaah!!
Enneana loves Nemard so, so much too, and... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0034
rows.name:
Being together forever from now on...
Uugh... I can't believe it, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0035
rows.name:
If you can't believe it, I'll just keep loving you
forever and ever until you do believe it, zo!
Ha ha! I'm persistent, zo, Enneana! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0036
rows.name:
Hic... Uugh!
Nemard, thank you... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0037
rows.name:
With this, the marriage is happily established, da.
A Bias man will absolutely never separate from the woman
he offered the horn ring to until death, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0038
rows.name:
Ha ha! Grandpa Aldo is also
scrunching up his face in joy for us... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030601_MSG0039
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]!
Thank you so much, na.
I will absolutely make her happy, zo! [ST:wait ]
